chapter_title.en: Chapter on Seeking Dwelling Places and Locations Where it is Disliked to Stay

text: 2499 - رَوَى اَلسَّكُونِيُّ بِإِسْنَادِهِ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «إِيَّاكُمْ وَ اَلتَّعْرِيسَ عَلَى ظَهْرِ اَلطَّرِيقِ وَ بُطُونِ اَلْأَوْدِيَةِ فَإِنَّهَا مَدَارِجُ اَلسِّبَاعِ وَ مَأْوَى اَلْحَيَّاتِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2499 - Al-Sakuni narrated with his chain of transmission that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) said:
"Beware of resting along the middle of roads and in the valleys, for they are pathways for wild beasts and shelters for snakes."
